expo.name: Political Soch
expo.description: Political Soch is a field survey platform for secure data collection, media verification, GPS capture, and admin monitoring.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Political Soch uses the camera to capture survey photos for verification.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Political Soch uses your location to attach GPS coordinates to survey submissions.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Political Soch uses the microphone to record survey voice notes for verification.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Political Soch to capture GPS coordinates for survey verification.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Political Soch to take photos for survey evidence.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Political Soch to record voice notes for survey evidence.
